projectDescription: Ansible automation for migrating Windows 10 Pro systems to Windows 11 with compatibility validation and automated upgrade workflows.
keyFeatures: Automated Windows 11 compatibility validation using WhyNotWin11
Two upgrade methods: Registry-based Windows Update and ISO-based installation
System restore point creation for rollback capability
WinRM configuration management for Ansible connectivity
Automated Windows Update patching pre and post-migration
publicApiSurface: migra_w10_to_w11.yml - Main playbook for Windows 10 to 11 migration
fase_1 role - Pre-upgrade phase: OS validation, compatibility check, restore point creation
fase_2 role - Upgrade phase: WinRM setup, ISO mounting, upgrade execution
fase_2/regedit_main.yml - Registry-based upgrade method using Windows Update
ansible.cfg - Ansible configuration with inventory settings
maquinas - Inventory file with Windows host definitions and WinRM connection parameters
fase_1_dir_whynotwin11 variable - Working directory path (default: C:\temp\ansible)
fase_2_dir_whynotwin11 variable - Working directory path for phase 2
WinRM.ps1 - PowerShell script for WinRM configuration restoration
